notableEvents.label: Leody Taveras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Leody Taveras grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Samuel Basallo out at 2nd. Leody Taveras out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso singles on a ground ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Taylor Ward scores. Gunnar Henderson to 3rd. Adley Rutschman to 2nd.
